What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Clear Cut Painting did an amazing job painting the interior of our home! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work was outstanding. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and how they protected our furniture. Highly recommend!

J
John B.

We hired Clear Cut Painting to paint the exterior of our house, and we couldn't be happier with the results. They did a fantastic job prepping the surfaces and the paint job looks flawless. Our house looks brand new! Their crew was courteous and professional throughout the entire project.

E
Emily K.

Clear Cut Painting transformed our outdated kitchen cabinets with a fresh coat of paint. The process was smooth, and the end result is beautiful. There was a minor delay, but they communicated clearly and made sure we were satisfied with the final product.

D
David L.

I had a large hole in my drywall from a plumbing repair, and Clear Cut Painting fixed it perfectly. You can't even tell there was ever any damage. They were prompt, professional, and their prices were very reasonable. I would definitely use them again!

Additional House Painter Services

Clear Cut Painting — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every house painter project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Clear Cut Painting Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific house painter needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Colorado Springs & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Colorado Springs, CO and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Colorado Springs Manitou Springs Fountain Monument Security-Widefield Palmer Lake Woodmoor Stratmoor
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our house painter services.

How long does interior painting typically take?

The duration of an interior painting project depends on the size and complexity of the job. A single room may take 1-2 days, while an entire house could take a week or more. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the consultation.

Do I need to move my furniture before you start painting?

We ask that you remove any small or fragile items from the room. We will carefully move and cover larger furniture to protect it from paint splatters. We take full responsibility for the safety of your belongings.

What type of paint do you use?

We use only premium-quality paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore. We can help you choose the right type of paint for each room, considering factors like durability, washability, and sheen.

Built on Colorado Springs Values

Get a free, no-obligation quote from Colorado Springs' trusted painting experts.
